scaffoldFiles.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
    "outDir": "dist"
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*", "app/**/*"]
}

# forge-agent

This project was generated by **Aurexis Forge** from a confirmed AgentSpec
and an approved BuildPlan. The boilerplate, tool library, and runtime
harness are deterministic scaffold output. The agent-specific logic
(entrypoint + handlers) is LLM-generated.

## Layout

- `src/lib/tools/` — the tool library. Use these — don't reimplement.
- `src/lib/runtime.ts` — the agent runtime harness.
- Other files — generated agent logic and the entrypoint.

## Conventions

- ES modules; local imports use `.js` extensions.
- TypeScript strict mode is on.
- All secrets and provider URLs come from `process.env`.

toolRegistry.label: Web search
toolRegistry.description: Search the public web for current information. Returns ranked results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

toolRegistry.label: HTTP request
toolRegistry.description: Make GET/POST/PUT/DELETE requests to any reachable HTTP endpoint. Use for arbitrary REST integrations.

toolRegistry.label: LLM completion
toolRegistry.description: Call an LLM from inside the agent for reasoning, summarisation, classification, or generation.

toolRegistry.label: File read
toolRegistry.description: Read text files from the agent's working storage.

toolRegistry.label: File write
toolRegistry.description: Write text files to the agent's working storage.

toolRegistry.label: Scheduled trigger
toolRegistry.description: Run the agent on a cron-like schedule (daily, hourly, every N minutes).

toolRegistry.label: Email read
toolRegistry.description: Read incoming email from a connected mailbox.

toolRegistry.label: Email send
toolRegistry.description: Send email from a configured sender address.
